description.value:
When the [[lookup @name lowercase]] begins its turn with 40 hit points or fewer, roll a [[/r d6]]. On a 6, it loses itself to a berserk frenzy and lashes out at the nearest creature it can see on each of its turns.

Behavior: If no creature is close enough to engage, the [[lookup @name lowercase]] attacks an object (preferring something smaller than itself). Once berserk, it remains that way until it is destroyed or regains all of its hit points and is no longer below the threshold.

Calming the Frenzy: The creator within 60 feet who can hear the [[lookup @name lowercase]] can use an action to make a [[/check]]{Charisma check, DC 15}. A success ends the berserk condition, but the [[lookup @name lowercase]] can roll again if it is still at 40 hit points or fewer and takes damage.
